title.en: Torah and Science: Are They Compatible?
title.zh: 托拉与科学:它们能相容吗?

description.en: Exploring how Jewish thought reconciles Torah with scientific discovery, from medieval sages to modern thinkers
description.zh: 探讨犹太思想如何调和托拉与科学发现，从中世纪智者到现代思想家
description.he: חקר כיצד המחשבה היהודית מתיישבת עם התגליות המדעיות, מחכמי ימי הביניים לחשובי זמננו

imageDescription.en: A serene Chinese shan shui landscape in traditional ink wash style, featuring a misty mountain valley with an ancient scholar's study pavilion perched on a cliff. Through the open pavilion windows, two streams of light converge — one golden (representing divine wisdom/Torah) descending from ethereal clouds above, and one silver-blue (representing scientific inquiry) rising from a flowing river below.
imageDescription.zh: 一幅宁静的中国山水画,传统水墨风格,展现薄雾笼罩的山谷,一座古老的书斋亭台坐落在悬崖上。透过开阔的窗户,两束光汇聚——一束金色(代表神圣智慧/托拉)从上方飘渺的云层降下,一束银蓝色(代表科学探索)从下方流动的河流升起。

chineseDynastyReferences.Southern Song: 南宋时期 (1127-1279) - When Maimonides lived, corresponding to the era of Zhu Xi's Neo-Confucianism
chineseDynastyReferences.Late Qing: 晚清时期 (1840-1912) - Period of Rabbi Hirsch, when traditional Chinese learning encountered Western science
chineseDynastyReferences.Ming-Qing transition: 明末清初 - Referenced for Rav Kook's era of great transformation
chineseDynastyReferences.Pre-Qin: 先秦诸子百家 - Era of philosophical diversity analogous to Jewish pluralistic approaches
chineseDynastyReferences.Han Dynasty: 汉代独尊儒术而不废黄老 - Model for harmonizing different knowledge systems
chineseDynastyReferences.Song-Ming: 宋明理学 - Neo-Confucian synthesis comparable to Jewish integration of Torah and philosophy

philosophicalParallels.GeWuZhiZhi: 格物致知 - Confucian 'investigation of things' parallel to scientific inquiry
philosophicalParallels.YinYang: 一阴一阳之谓道 - Complementary principles like Torah and science
philosophicalParallels.Dao: 道可道，非常道 - Ultimate reality beyond description, parallel to divine mystery
philosophicalParallels.ZhuangziTime: 天地一指也，万物一马也 - Zhuangzi's relative concept of time
philosophicalParallels.XuGuangqi: 欲求超胜，必须会通 - Xu Guangqi's principle of synthesis and integration
